introSection: Max's Doggy Dog Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Fantasy Island in Grand Island, New York, USA. The ride was bought by Boomers in 2020, but would be stored and never setup. Its current status is unknown.
fullText: Max's Doggy Dog Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Fantasy Island in Grand Island, New York, USA. The ride was bought by Boomers in 2020, but would be stored and never setup. Its current status is unknown.
